3 .16 Non-current assets (or disposal groups) held for sale

Non-current assets (or disposal groups) are classified as assets held for sale when their carrying amount is to be recovered principally through asale
transaction and a sale is considered highly probable. They are stated at the lower of carrying amount and fair value less costs to sell.
